zh: 機會成本，指選擇一項行動而放棄的其他選項的價值。
en: Whichever you don't choose is called the opportunity cost.
en_example: Whichever you don't choose is called the opportunity cost.
zh_example: Whichever you don't choose is called the opportunity cost.
ja: 機会費用とは、ある選択をすることで失われる他の選択肢の価値のこと。
ja_example: Whichever you don't choose is called the opportunity cost.

zh: 優先排序，將重要的事情放在首位。
en: You can't always do everything, so prioritizing what's most important is key.
en_example: You can't always do everything, so prioritizing what's most important is key.
zh_example: You can't always do everything, so prioritizing what's most important is key.
ja: 優先順位をつけること、重要なことを先に行うこと。
ja_example: You can't always do everything, so prioritizing what's most important is key.

en: Quitting feeds up time spent on a project that might get nowhere.
en_example: Quitting feeds up time spent on a project that might get nowhere.
zh_example: Quitting feeds up time spent on a project that might get nowhere.
ja: やめること、諦めること。
ja_example: Quitting feeds up time spent on a project that might get nowhere.

en: He chose to discontinue 70% of Apple's product.
en_example: He chose to discontinue 70% of Apple's product.
zh_example: He chose to discontinue 70% of Apple's product.
ja: 中止する、販売や提供をやめること。
ja_example: He chose to discontinue 70% of Apple's product.

en: You will know whether to keep enduring or quit.
en_example: You will know whether to keep enduring or quit.
zh_example: You will know whether to keep enduring or quit.
ja: 耐え忍ぶこと、困難に耐えること。
ja_example: You will know whether to keep enduring or quit.

en: Doing something you dislike can cause a lot of stress.
en_example: Doing something you dislike can cause a lot of stress.
zh_example: Doing something you dislike can cause a lot of stress.
ja: ストレス、精神的な緊張や負担。
ja_example: Doing something you dislike can cause a lot of stress.

en: Quitting those things can relieve you way better.
en_example: Quitting those things can relieve you way better.
zh_example: Quitting those things can relieve you way better.
ja_example: Quitting those things can relieve you way better.

en: You want to be determined to fix it because you don't want to see as a loser.
en_example: You want to be determined to fix it because you don't want to see as a loser.
zh_example: You want to be determined to fix it because you don't want to see as a loser.
ja: 決心している、断固とした。
ja_example: You want to be determined to fix it because you don't want to see as a loser.

en: Stress can result in drug and alcohol misuse.
en_example: Stress can result in drug and alcohol misuse.
zh_example: Stress can result in drug and alcohol misuse.
ja_example: Stress can result in drug and alcohol misuse.

en: Quitting these things will give you the opportunity to reflect and find more meaning in life.
en_example: Quitting these things will give you the opportunity to reflect and find more meaning in life.
zh_example: Quitting these things will give you the opportunity to reflect and find more meaning in life.
ja_example: Quitting these things will give you the opportunity to reflect and find more meaning in life.

en: I was juggling school exams, competitions, swimming and piano.
en_example: I was juggling school exams, competitions, swimming and piano.
zh_example: I was juggling school exams, competitions, swimming and piano.
ja: 複数のことを同時にこなすこと。
ja_example: I was juggling school exams, competitions, swimming and piano.

en: It all depends on your perspective and circumstances.
en_example: It all depends on your perspective and circumstances.
zh_example: It all depends on your perspective and circumstances.
ja_example: It all depends on your perspective and circumstances.
